metadata.description: Regional benchmark defaults for ecommerce financial modeling

source.title: State Corporate Income Tax Rates and Brackets, 2024
source.snippet: Federal 21% + weighted state average ~5% = 26% combined effective rate

effective_tax_rate.notes: Federal 21% + average state rate ~5% (varies by state from 0% to 11.5%)

source.title: Occupational Employment and Wage Statistics
source.snippet: Baseline reference for US ecommerce operations salaries (~$72k median)

salary_multiplier.notes: US is baseline reference (multiplier = 1.0) for all other regions

source.title: What is the Average Cost of Shipping an Ecommerce Order?
source.snippet: Average ecommerce shipping cost in the US ranges from $7-10 per order

shipping_cost_per_order.notes: Domestic shipping, standard ground, 1-3lb package typical

source.title: Rates and Allowances: Corporation Tax
source.snippet: Small profits rate of 19% applies for companies with profits up to £50,000

effective_tax_rate.notes: Small profits rate for pre-launch/early-stage businesses; main rate is 25% for profits over £250,000

source.title: Ecommerce Manager Salaries in United Kingdom

salary_multiplier.notes: Lower nominal salaries but similar purchasing power; London significantly higher

shipping_cost_per_order.notes: Smaller geography = lower shipping costs; converted from GBP at 1.27 USD/GBP

source.title: Corporate Tax Rates in Europe, 2024
source.snippet: EU average corporate tax rate 21.3%; Germany 29.9%, France 25.8%, Ireland 12.5%

effective_tax_rate.notes: EU average 21.3%; significant variation by country (Germany 29.9%, Ireland 12.5%)

source.title: E-commerce Manager Salary in Germany
source.snippet: Average ecommerce manager salary €55,000-68,000 in Germany (~$60,000-74,000 USD)

salary_multiplier.notes: Weighted average of DE, FR, NL; higher taxes but social benefits included

source.title: The Average Shipping Costs in Europe
source.snippet: Average shipping cost €7.00 across EU (€3.20 to €24.45 range)

shipping_cost_per_order.notes: Intra-EU shipping; cross-border adds complexity; converted from EUR at 1.08 USD/EUR

source.title: Corporation Tax Rates
source.snippet: Small business rate: 9% federal + ~3% provincial average = 12.2% (income under $500k)

effective_tax_rate.notes: Small business deduction applies; general rate 15% federal + ~12% provincial

salary_multiplier.notes: Similar to US but slightly lower nominal; strong tech sector in Toronto/Vancouver

source.title: Shipping Rates
source.snippet: Standard parcel CAD $15-18 for domestic shipping

shipping_cost_per_order.notes: Higher due to large geography and lower population density

source.title: Company Tax Rates
source.snippet: Base rate entity: 25% for companies with turnover under $50M AUD

effective_tax_rate.notes: Base rate entity (small business) rate; reduces to 25% for all companies from 2024-25

source.title: Ecommerce Manager Salary in Australia
source.snippet: Average salary AUD $95,000-110,000 (~$62,000-72,000 USD) plus 11.5% superannuation

salary_multiplier.notes: Higher nominal salaries; 11.5% mandatory superannuation adds to employer costs

shipping_cost_per_order.notes: Higher due to geography and lower population density

source.title: Corporate Tax Rates by Country, 2024
source.snippet: Global average corporate tax rate approximately 23-25%

effective_tax_rate.notes: Conservative default based on global average; recommend region-specific research

salary_multiplier.notes: Conservative default; weighted toward emerging markets

shipping_cost_per_order.notes: Conservative default based on US baseline
